_note: PLACEHOLDER timing. Cadence / follow-up delays / send windows are DEFERRED — they come from the researched drafting playbook. The mechanism READS these values; timing must never be hardcoded elsewhere. The `graduation` thresholds below are operational policy (from the brief) and are real, not placeholders.

send_window._comment: PLACEHOLDER — weekday ints (Mon=0). Real send window TBD from playbook.

_follow_up_note: PLACEHOLDER follow-up cadence (days after previous touch). TBD from playbook.

warmup._comment: Per-inbox daily send ceiling by warm-up day (1-indexed). Ramps a new sending mailbox up gradually to protect deliverability; caps at `steady`. Effective cap = min(PER_INBOX_DAILY_CAP, this). Day derived from the inbox's first LIVE send.
